---
title: "02 fastp Trim"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

Trim adapters and low-quality bases from unpaired FASTQ files using `fastp`.

# Inputs

- FASTQ root: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq`
- Input pattern: `*_unpaired.fq.gz`

# Outputs

- Trimmed FASTQs: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq/trim/*_fastp.fq.gz`
- Reports: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq/trim/reports/`
- Sample list: `/work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq/trim/unpaired_fastq.list`

# Scripts

- `scripts/02_fastp_trim/prepare_fastp_unpaired_array.sh`
- `scripts/02_fastp_trim/fastp_unpaired_array.sh`
- `scripts/02_fastp_trim/run_fastp_unpaired.sh`

# Run

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/NEW/1.fastq
bash prepare_fastp_unpaired_array.sh
sbatch --array=1-571%16 fastp_unpaired_array.sh
```
